[The Legend of Zelda Tears of the Kingdom (US) v1.1.0 (v131072) TID=0100F2C0115B6000 BID=D5AD6AC71EF53E3E]

[60 FPS (Disable + Restore Code for 30FPS)]
040E0000 0090EAC4 52800021
040E0000 00EBD258 52800021
040E0000 0090EA90 52800035
040E0000 0090EB38 52800035

[Invincible]
400B0000 00000000 00D1BA2C
640F01B0 00000000 9477B09A
[Kaito B - invisible to Boss Attacks]

[Invincible Off]
400B0000 00000000 00D1BA2C
640F01B0 00000000 BC43CD00

[  MoonJump  Hover (TomSwitch)★]
04000000 00703800 F94002B3
04000000 04A71100 F94002B3
04000000 04A71104 18000068
04000000 04A71108 B900FE68
04000000 04A7110C 16F249BE
80000100

04000000 04A71110 3F800000
20000000
80000104
04000000 00703800 150DB640
04000000 04A71110 41200000
20000000

[Controls:]
[Hold X Moonjump]
[Hold ZL Hover]
[Hold R and release to activate Hover Controls]
[Hold ZL+Y to raise up]
[Hold ZL+R to Descend Down]

[(ZL+Y) Hover Add On (Slow MoonJump)]

[Attack Range Extender Distancee 10x]
04000000 0231DE94 1E249000
[a7251835]
[Warning: Enemy will have the same attack destance, world hazards like fire will extend too]

[Attack Range Extender Distancee 20x]
04000000 0231DE94 1E269000
[a7251835]
[Do long Range sword Attacks like Sephiroth from 20 meters away]
[enviroment hazzards like fire blocking entrance will extend 20x from its location, turn off cheat to bypass]

[Attack Distance Reset]
04000000 0231DE94 1E2638A6
[a7251835]
